reviews.review_title: Hit those blocks with your chucks
reviews.review_description:
Neon Chuck is a neon/cyberpunk aesthetics rhythm-action game built around nunchuck-inspired combat. Instead of slicing blocks like in traditional rhythm games, the focus is on momentum, impact, and physically swinging your virtual weapon with flow and precision.

The combat feels more like drumming or martial arts practice than classic rhythm gameplay. 

That said, Neon Chuck is clearly aimed at a specific audience. It is not a deep story-driven VR adventure or a realistic combat simulator. The experience is more about movement, rhythm, reflexes, and getting into a satisfying gameplay flow.

I recommend this game for fans of rhythm VR games like Beat Saber or Synth Riders and for players who enjoy active, physical VR gameplay. People looking for a fun arcade-style workout.

I hope to see a leaderboard in the future.
